final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing single large knowledge card illustration for children about the story of 赤壁之战 (Battle of Red Cliffs) from 三国.

Style/medium: needs a children's cartoon / illustrated storybook aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large card layout with a clear title at top, key story bullet points listed and labeled on the side, and a cartoon narrative scene as the main body
Subject: must include the 赤壁之战 story from 三国, depicted in child-friendly cartoon form
Scene/backdrop: must include a river battle scene evoking 赤壁 — fire, warships, and dramatic action rendered in a gentle, age-appropriate cartoon style
Lighting/mood: needs a vivid, engaging, child-friendly atmosphere — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a bright, lively direction suitable for children — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs an illustrated card surface treatment — exact texture and finish are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "赤壁之战" as the main title; must include clearly labeled bullet-point key facts / story beats listed on the side panel
Constraints: must preserve single-card format; title must be clearly legible; side bullet points must be visually distinct and numbered or marked; overall content must be age-appropriate for children
Avoid:
